chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-645 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- None present for the Petitioner. The grievance is that the Respondents are not deciding the Application of Petitioner for Demarcation. Learned AAG present has no objection if the Application is decided as per Rules. Petition is disposed of by directing the Respondents to decide the Application of Petitioner within 2 weeks after Notice to him and to complete other codal formalities. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
